title: ROGUE COMMUNITY COLLEGE - 211info
text: ROGUE COMMUNITY COLLEGE ROGUE COMMUNITY COLLEGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of educational, vocational, college credit, and developmental courses, including pre-college education, GED test instruction, continuing education opportunities, and English as a Second Language(ESL) classes. Individual campuses are located in a wide variety of cities within the service area. 3345 Redwood Highway Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 956-7500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 956-7500 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties Services: Adult Basic Education Community Colleges English as a Second Language GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROGUE COMMUNITY COLLEGE
